title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Godrej Properties Advisory Limited - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is actively seeking a talented and motivated Property Consultant to join our dynamic team in Meerut. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Godrej Properties Advisory Limited:
Godrej Properties Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Properties Advisory Limited!
